case_title: JESSIE MAE SAWYER VS. LIVE FIT GYM

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIVE FIT GYM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SAWYER, JESSIE MAE (MAE SAWYER) AS TO DEFENDANT LIVE FIT GYM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SAWYER, JESSIE MAE (MAE SAWYER)
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SAWYER, JESSIE MAE (MAE SAWYER)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT LIVE FIT GYM ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS, (PICKED UP BY MANAGAGER OF LIVE FIT GYM - DARRES MCMAHON)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB-03-2020
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL THE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAWYER, JESSIE MAE (MAE SAWYER)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAWYER, JESSIE MAE (MAE SAWYER) AS TO DEFENDANT LIVE FIT GYM
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-18-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIVE FIT GYM
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LIVE FIT GYM
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - DENIED [X] THE REQUEST WAS FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE LATE REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAWYER, JESSIE MAE (MAE SAWYER) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIVE FIT GYM $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,090.00, PLAINTIFF WAS EMPLOYED AS A MASSAGE THERAPIST AND PHYSICAL THERAPIST FOR 6 MONTHS. DURING THIS PERIOD DEFENDANT DID NOT PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH AN APPROPRIATE WORK ENVIRONMENT WITH OPPORTUNITIES FOR WORK AND WITHOUT UNDUE INTERRUPTIONS AND HARASSMENT. AS A RESULT, PLAINTIFF SUFFERS DAMAGES OF $7000 IN LOSS COMPENSATION. DEFENDANT PROVIDED NO DOCUMENTS OR AGREEMENTS SHOWING PLAINTIFF WAS EMPLOYED AT THE WILL OF EMPLOYER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JESSIE MAE SAWYER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LIVE FIT GYM IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DARRES MCMAHON, MANAGER. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT LIVE FIT GYM ACCOUNTANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
